title: Human biases and remedies in AI safety and alignment contexts
body_text:
Human biases and remedies in AI safety and alignment contexts
TLDR: How relevant cognitive biases could affect the general public’s perception of AI developments and risks associated with advanced AI are discussed and remedies that could reduce or eliminate these biases are reviewed to improve resource allocation, prioritization, and planning.
Authors: Zoé Roy-Stang, Jim Davies
Venue: AI and Ethics
Fields: Computer Science
